steps.title: Identify the names
steps.content: The phrase must identify which researchers are attesting to the claim. “Roberto Scandone and Christopher Kilburn” names the specific researchers, so the names are essential rather than extra information.

steps.title: Use no commas
steps.content: Choice A incorrectly sets the names off with commas. Choice B uses only the opening comma of that incorrect structure. Choice D wrongly inserts a comma between the paired names. No commas are needed between “researchers” and the names. The answer is C.
